headline: Fed nominee Warsh takes the reins as inflation hits 3-year high
summary: Scott Melker dives into Wall Street's biggest bank, JPMorgan, entering tokenization, Q1 earnings hit crypto like a freight train, Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh walking into an inflation crisis on day one, and other big crypto headlines."The Daily Wolf with Scott Melker" airs every day at 12:00 p.m. Tune in for your daily dose of all things crypto.Make sure to also check out Yahoo Finance's new crypto hub to find the latest crypto-related news.

headline: How Investors Are Reacting To BlackRock (BLK) Doubling Down On Tokenized Funds And Digital Asset Infrastructure
summary: In recent days, BlackRock has expanded its presence in digital assets through a second tokenized fund filing, participation in Circle’s US$222 million Arc blockchain presale, and large cryptocurrency transfers, while senior executives highlighted AI and market shifts at major conferences and policy gatherings. This combination of blockchain initiatives and AI-focused commentary underscores BlackRock’s ambition to be a leading infrastructure and asset manager for an increasingly digital,...

headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Jones Futures Fall, S&P 500 Gains As Trump Takes Big Tech Leaders To China—Nvidia, Nextpower, Red Cat In Focus
summary: U.S. stock futures were mixed on Wednesday after Monday’s mostly lower close. Dow Jones futures fell, whereas S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 indices were rising. headline: BlackRock® Canada Announces May Cash Distributions for the iShares® ETFs
summary: TORONTO, May 13, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- BlackRock Asset Management Canada Limited (“BlackRock Canada”), an indirect, wholly-owned subsidiary of BlackRock, Inc. (NYSE: BLK), today announced the May 2026 cash distributions for the iShares ETFs listed on the TSX or Cboe Canada which pay on a monthly basis, as well as iShares S&P/TSX 60 Index ETF (XIU) and iShares Canadian Real Return Bond Index ETF (XRB). Unitholders of record of the applicable iShares ETF, with exception of XRB, on May 21, 2026

headline: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink Warns AI Will Create Brutal 'K Economy' With Only Few Winners
summary: BlackRock Inc. (NYSE:BLK) CEO Larry Fink warns that the staggering capital required to sustain the artificial intelligence (AI) revolution will fracture global markets, creating a “K economy” in which only a select few dominant players thrive. At the same time, smaller competitors are forced into consolidation. headline: Metis sees opportunity in U.S.-China healthcare collaboration despite tech tensions
summary: Metis TechBio shares surged on its HKEX Main Board debut in a listing that raised $270 million. Co-founder and CEO Chris Lai says the company uses AI to design nano-scale drug delivery systems that pinpoint and reprogram diseased cells — with Hong Kong serving as its bridge to global pharma capital and partners. He also addresses the geopolitical risks of operating across both China and the U.S.
